title: Acme Corp — carbon baseline kickoff
transcript: Jane (Acme Corp, Head of Sustainability): We need the Scope 1 and 2 baseline before the board meeting on June 6. Consultant: I'll deliver the baseline report by June 2, and we decided to defer Scope 3 to phase two. Jane: Agreed. Consultant: One thing worth flagging as a broader lesson — procurement data quality is the single biggest blocker to baselining across almost every client I work with. Jane: Noted. Let's also schedule the supplier survey. Consultant: I'll send the supplier survey template by May 18. Jane: Perfect. Consultant: We also decided that the primary emission factor source will be the GHG Protocol database rather than custom factors for now. Jane: That keeps us consistent with what our auditors expect.
